revision.comment: ---- ==Usage== This template is intended to provide a consistent "See also" for templates with "date" and "now" related titles.
Robot: Change redirected category [[:Category:Navigational templates|Navigational templates]] to [[:Category:Navigational boxes|Navigational boxes]]
Robot - Moving category See also templates to [[:Category:Related-topic templates]] per [[WP:CFD|CFD]] at [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2013 December 23]].

revision.text: *{{tl|Date}} - dmy, etc. *{{tl|DATE}} - parameter for templates ("date=") *{{tl|Currentdate}} - time, day-of-week, and mdy *{{tl|Now}} - <nowiki>{{Currentdate}}</nowiki> as sentence *{{tl|Plain now}} - dmy and time *{{tl|Right now}} - blue box with the current time and the current # of Wikipedia articles *{{tl|Right now (User message)}} - {{tl|Right now}}, but orange *{{tl|TODAY}} - dmy<noinclude> {{doc|content= ==Usage== This template is intended to provide a consistent "See also" for templates with "date" and "now" related titles. [[Category:Navigational boxes]] [[Category:Related-topic templates]] }} </noinclude>

*{{tl|Date}} - dmy, etc. *{{tl|DATE}} - parameter for templates ("date=") *{{tl|Currentdate}} - time, day-of-week, and mdy *{{tl|Now}} - <nowiki>{{Currentdate}}</nowiki> as sentence *{{tl|Plain now}} - dmy and time *{{tl|Right now}} - blue box with the current time and the current # of Wikipedia articles *{{tl|Right now (User message)}} - <nowiki>{{Right now}}</nowiki>, but orange *{{tl|TODAY}} - dmy<noinclude> {{doc|content= ==Usage== This template is intended to provide a consistent "See also" for templates with "date" and "now" related titles. [[Category:Navigational boxes]] [[Category:Related-topic templates]] }} </noinclude>

{{tl|Currentdate}} - time, day-of-week, and mdy {{tl|Date}} - dmy, etc. {{tl|DATE}} - parameter for templates ("date=") {{tl|Now}} - <nowiki>{{Currentdate}}</nowiki> as sentence {{tl|Plain now}} - dmy and time {{tl|Right now}} - blue box with time and current # of Wikipedia articles {{tl|Right now (User message)}} - <nowiki>{{Right now}}</nowiki>, but orange {{tl|TODAY}} - dmy<noinclude> {{doc|content= ==Usage== This template is intended to provide a consistent "See also" for templates with "date" and "now" related titles.
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Age calculation templates]] *{{tl|Start date}} [[Category:Navigational boxes]] [[Category:Related-topic templates]] }} </noinclude>

revision.comment: keep all these date templates out of the hlist tracking category
Undid revision 730097629 by [[Special:Contributions/VarunFEB2003|VarunFEB2003]] ([[User talk:VarunFEB2003|talk]]) not relevant to this template
Frietjes moved page [[Template:Date templates]] to [[Template:Date and time templates]]: expanding to include more templates
Fix deprecated parameter in Template:Div col using [[WP:AutoEd|AutoEd]]

revision.text:
{{align|right|[{{edit|Template:Date and time templates}}]}} '''Date and time''' * {{tl|time}} – Display the current date and time of a timezone '''(ajustable)''' * {{tl|Currentdate}} – Time, day of week, and date in MDY format *{{tl|Plain now}} – Date in DMY format ** {{tl|Now}} – Same as {{tl|Plain now}} but in a sentence '''Date only''' * {{tl|Dateoffset}} – The date in a certain UTC offset '''(ajustable)''' * {{tl|Date}} – Date in chosen format ** {{tl|DATE}} – month and year, prefixed by "date=" (for use with templates through substitution) * {{tl|TODAY}} – Date in DMY '''Time only''' * {{tl|TIMEONLY}} '''(ajustable)''' * {{tl|CURRENTTIME}} (12 h format) * {{tl|CURRENTTIME24}} (24 h format) '''Banners''' * {{tl|Right now}} – Blue banner with time and current number of Wikipedia articles ** {{tl|Right now (User message)}} – Orange banner with time and current number of Wikipedia articles ---- {| class="wikitable" |+ !UNIT OF TIME !AJUSTABLE !CURRENT !Other !Last !Next |- |SECOND | |{{tl|CURRENTSECOND}} | | | |- |MINUTE | |{{tl|CURRENTMINUTE}} | | | |- |HOUR | |{{tl|Currenthour}} | |{{tl|Hour-1}} |{{tl|Hour+1}} |- |WEEK | |{{tl|CURRENTWEEKOFYEAR}} {{tl|CURRENTWEEKOFMONTH}} | | | |- |Day of Week |{{tl|WEEKDAYNAME}}
{{tl|WEEKDAYABBREV}}
{{tl|WEEKDAY}} |{{tl|CURRENTWEEKDAYNAME}}
{{tl|CURRENTWEEKDAYABBREV}}
{{tl|CURRENTWEEKDAY}} | | | |- |MONTH |{{tl|MONTHNAME}}
{{tl|MONTHABBREV}}
{{tl|MONTHNUMBER}}
{{tl|MONTH}} (zero padded) |{{tl|Currentmonth}}
{{tl|CURRENTMONTHABBREV}}
{{tl|CURRENTMONTHNUMBER}}
{{tl|CURRENTMONTHDAYS}} | | | |- |Day of Month |{{tl|DAYOFMONTH}} |{{tl|Currentday}} | | | |- |YEAR | |{{tl|CURRENTYEARCC}}
{{tl|CURRENTYEARYY}}
{{tl|CURRENTISOYEAR}}
{{Tl|CURRENTYEAR}} |{{tl|NEXTYEAR}} | | |- |Day of Year |{{tl|DAYOFYEAR}} |{{tl|CURRENTDAYOFYEAR}} | | | |- |CENTURY |{{tl|CENTURY}} |{{tl|CURRENTCENTURY}} | | | |- |MILLENNIUM |{{tl|Millennium}} |{{tl|Currentmillennium}} | |} ---- {{col-begin}} {{col-break}} *{{tl|Calendar}} *{{tl|Calendar clock with Wikipedia stats}} *{{tl|Clock}} *{{tl|Digital clock}} *{{tl|Digital clock and date}} {{col-break}} * [[:Category:Time, date and calendar templates]] * [[:Category:Date-computing templates]] * [[:Category:Date-computing templates based on current time]] * [[:Category:ISO date templates]] * [[:Category:Calendar templates]] * [[:Category:Clock templates]] {{col-end}} {{documentation |content= ==Usage== This template is intended to provide a consistent "See also" for templates with "date" and "now" related titles. ==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Age calculation templates]] *{{tl|Start date}} [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}

(Has the day of the week) |{{tl|Date}} (Chose format)

{{tl|Day-1}} |{{tl|Tomorrow}}

{{tl|CURRENTTIME24}} (24 h format) | | |- |Banners | |{{tl|Right now}}
(Blue with time and number of Wikipedia articles) | | |- |Timestamp | |{{tl|Timestamp}}
(Format YYYYMMDDhhmmss)
